violations.violation: Use of standard colors bg-red-400 and bg-amber-400 instead of Obsidian/Gold/Violet system tokens.
Use of standard colors text-red-400 and text-amber-300 instead of Obsidian/Gold/Violet system tokens.
Use of standard colors border-amber-400/40 and text-amber-300 instead of Obsidian/Gold/Violet system tokens.

patch.target:
const laneClass = state?.lastRezeroed
    ? 'border-amber-400/40 text-amber-300'
    : lane === 'REMOTE_MCP'
      ? 'border-violet/40 text-violet-light'
      : 'border-gold/30 text-gold-light';
patch.replacement:
const laneClass = state?.lastRezeroed
    ? 'border-gold/30 text-gold-light font-semibold'
    : lane === 'REMOTE_MCP'
      ? 'border-violet/40 text-violet-light'
      : 'border-gold/30 text-gold-light';

details.result: PASSED. Next.js PWA contains no API keys or raw credentials. All communication is WebSocket-based connecting to the Bifrost server, which holds secrets only in the server environment.
PASSED. Webhook receiver /webhook/sms in apps/bifrost/src/server.ts validates x-webhook-signature using constant-time buffer comparison. Rejects requests immediately if WEBHOOK_SECRET is empty.
PASSED. assertTailscaleEndpoint in apps/bifrost/src/mcp.ts intercepts outbound REMOTE_MCP endpoints and rejects any URL outside loopback/Tailscale MagicDNS/CGNAT.
WARN. The component <KineticCanvas /> is planned but not yet implemented. The directory apps/pwa/src/components/3d contains only .gitkeep.
details.remediation: When <KineticCanvas /> is added, it MUST be wrapped with next/dynamic and ssr: false (e.g. const KineticCanvas = dynamic(() => import('../components/3d/KineticCanvas'), { ssr: false })) to prevent blocking the initial paint and keeping FCP < 1.2s.
